description: Planned machine-readable report shape for a future Rust Local Index Parity Candidate.

parity_id.description: Stable identifier for the parity run.

oracle_version.description: Python-oracle fixture pack or local-index oracle version.

rust_candidate_version.description: Future Rust local-index candidate version; not present as implementation in this planning milestone.

build_status.description: Normalized build/status comparison against the Python Local Index oracle.

normalized_outputs.description: Paths or embedded summaries for normalized Rust and Python outputs.

divergences.description: All observed Python/Rust differences after normalization.

accepted_divergences.description: Subset of divergences that are explicitly accepted under tests/parity/ALLOWED_DIVERGENCES.md.

failed_cases.description: Case IDs that did not match and were not accepted divergences.

non_goals: This schema does not implement Rust local-index behavior.
This schema does not require Cargo for Python-only planning validation.
This schema does not wire Rust into runtime or surfaces.
